seniority.level: Staff / Principal PM (likely Director-adjacent given 10+ years requirement)
level_signals: strong leadership, cross-functional collaboration, and communication skills
defining a new category at the intersection of AI and commerce

must_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Have 10+ years of product management experience with strong leadership, cross-functional collaboration, and communication skills.
Bring experience in shopping, e-commerce, marketplaces, search, recommendations, consumer growth, or related product areas.
Have built and scaled impactful consumer products serving large and diverse user bases.
Are comfortable navigating ambiguity and excited about defining a new category at the intersection of AI, commerce, and consumer experiences.
Collaborate with cross-functional teams—including design, engineering, product, and go-to-market—to build and scale AI-native shopping experiences.
Use both data and user feedback to identify opportunities, measure impact, and inform product strategy.

nice_to_haves.raw_text_from_jd: Are motivated by OpenAI's mission and excited to shape how millions of people discover, evaluate, and purchase products with AI.

scope.surface: AI-powered shopping experiences within ChatGPT, including product discovery, recommendations, personalization, and conversational commerce
scope.business_model: B2C consumer AI product with B2B merchant/brand ecosystem components
primary_metrics_inferred: User adoption of shopping experiences in ChatGPT
Product discovery and purchase conversion rates
core_responsibilities: Define and drive the product vision for shopping experiences in ChatGPT
Partner with research teams to explore how AI can help users discover, evaluate, and confidently purchase products
Collaborate with cross-functional teams to build and scale AI-native shopping experiences
Partner with growth, GTM, marketing, and business teams to drive user adoption, merchant engagement, and ecosystem growth
Work with merchants, brands, retailers, and external partners to improve product quality and user outcomes
Use data and user feedback to identify opportunities, measure impact, and inform product strategy

green_flags: Clear and specific product surface defined (shopping within ChatGPT)
High-impact, highly visible role at the intersection of AI and commerce
OpenAI is a category-defining AI company with significant resources
Broad cross-functional scope signals significant PM ownership and influence
red_flags: Role requires onsite presence in San Francisco with no remote option mentioned
10+ years requirement is a hard bar that eliminates most mid-level candidates
JD does not clarify whether this is an IC or people-management role — ambiguity for candidates with or without management aspirations

fields_inferred_not_stated: seniority.level (inferred from 10+ years requirement and scope of responsibilities)

location.remote_us_eligible (inferred as false from 'This position is based in San Francisco, CA' with no remote option mentioned)
ambiguities: The JD requires 'strong leadership' and mentions 'strong leadership, cross-functional collaboration' but does not clarify if people management is expected. This role could be a Staff/Principal IC PM or a PM manager.

The 'You might thrive in this role if you' framing for all requirements creates ambiguity about which are truly hard requirements vs. strong preferences. The 10+ years and domain experience bullets have been treated as hard given their specificity and seniority signal.
Visa sponsorship and work authorization policy are not mentioned in the JD body.
